title: 日本ダービーの後に・遠い背中

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower pulls out all the stops at the
Japanese Derby, but she's still unable to catch up
to Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets her sights on the long-distance Kikuka
Sho as the stage for their rematch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This upcoming race will be make-or-break for a
stayer like Rice Shower, so it's back to training for
us.
